metadata.homeDescription: Find your next car at Car Dealership. Browse our selection of quality new and pre-owned vehicles.
metadata.carsDescription: Browse our full inventory of quality new and pre-owned vehicles.
metadata.aboutDescription: Visit Car Dealership or get in touch. Find our location, hours, and contact information.
metadata.addCarTitle: Add New Car | Car Dealership Admin

hero.subtitle: Rigorously inspected vehicles prepared with total transparency. We combine quality with the best financing options and an exclusive import-to-order service.

home.subtitle: Handpicked vehicles ready for you
home.noVehiclesHint: Check back soon for our latest inventory!
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Find Your Next Car?
home.ctaSubtitle: Visit our dealership or discover all the vehicles available on our website. Our team is ready to help you find the ideal vehicle for you.

cars.title: Our Inventory
cars.subtitle: Browse our complete selection of vehicles
cars.noVehiclesHint: Check back soon for our latest additions!

carDetail.interestedSubtitle: Contact us to schedule a test drive or get more information.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We are your trusted car dealership. We pride ourselves on offering quality vehicles at fair prices, backed by exceptional customer service.
about.story1: Our dealership has years of experience in the automotive market, earning the trust of the community over time.
about.story2: At our dealership, service is friendly, straightforward, and hassle-free. Each customer is supported with care and transparency throughout every stage of the process.
about.story3: Whether you are looking for your first car or a vehicle for your family, we are ready to help you find the right solution, with the honesty and commitment that define us.
about.findUsHint: Visit us to see our vehicles in person.

footer.description: Your trusted car dealership. Quality vehicles, fair prices, and exceptional service.

error.title: Something went wrong

error.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.description: Your account does not have permission to access the admin panel. If you believe this is an error, please contact the site administrator or try signing in with a different account.
